2606.03069.title: ROBUST-WT: Robust Uncertainty-aware Segmentation Transform via Whitening and Training Enhancements
2606.03069.paper_summary: Generalized segmentation of medical images prevents performance degradation when different imaging devices and clinical protocols are used across multiple domains. The Whitening Transform-based Probabilistic Shape Regularization Extractor (WT-PSE), published in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging in 2024, addresses this challenge by employing feature decorrelation and Wasserstein distance-based knowledge distillation to achieve robust cross-domain segmentation. This study systematically examines improvements to the WT-PSE learning framework. Four limitations in the original implementation are identified: limited training augmentations that fail to simulate real scanner variations, reliance on per-pixel binary cross-entropy loss that is sensitive to edge noise, the absence of a scheduled loss weighting strategy that may destabilize early training, and the lack of ablation switches for controlled scientific comparison. To address these issues, we propose four enhancements: (1) domain-adaptive augmentation including random erasing, gamma correction, and salt-and-pepper noise; (2) a hybrid BCE and Dice loss function for improved edge-aware segmentation under noisy conditions; (3) a curriculum-based Dice weight scheduling strategy; and (4) command-line control flags for systematic ablation studies. Experiments on the fundus optic disc segmentation benchmark demonstrate that the improved pipeline achieves a final epoch optic-disc Dice score of 0.956 and an ASD score of 13.31, outperforming the baseline epoch-5 Dice score of 0.939. These results indicate that training-level improvements can provide consistent performance gains without modifying the underlying WT-PSE architecture.
2606.03069.paper_summary_zh: 一般化醫學影像的分割可防止在多個領域中使用不同影像設備和臨床協議時性能下降。基於白化變換的概率形狀正則化提取器（WT-PSE），於2024年發表在《IEEE醫學影像學報》上，通過採用特徵去相關和基於Wasserstein距離的知識蒸餾來應對這一挑戰，以實現穩健的跨域分割。本研究系統地檢視了對WT-PSE學習框架的改進。原始實現中識別出四個限制：有限的訓練增強無法模擬真實掃描儀變化，依賴於對邊緣噪聲敏感的每像素二元交叉熵損失，缺乏可能使早期訓練不穩定的計劃損失加權策略，以及缺乏可控科學比較的消融開關。為了解決這些問題，我們提出四項增強： (1) 包括隨機擦除、伽瑪校正和鹽與胡椒噪聲的領域自適應增強； (2) 一種混合BCE和Dice損失函數，以在噪聲條件下改善邊緣感知分割； (3) 一種基於課程的Dice權重調度策略；以及 (4) 用於系統消融研究的命令行控制標誌。在視網膜光碟分割基準上的實驗表明，改進的管道在最後一個時期達到了光碟Dice分數0.956和ASD分數13.31，超越了基線第5個時期的Dice分數0.939。這些結果表明，訓練級別的改進可以在不修改基礎WT-PSE架構的情況下提供一致的性能提升。
2606.03069.author: Aqsa Naseer et.al.
2606.03069.authors: Aqsa Naseer, Maryam Bibi, Syeda Samiya Urooj, Muhammad Khurram Shahzad
